title: (Bullish Signal) FLUX, price may climb as it breaks lower Bollinger Band on 02/25
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could be a signal that FLUX may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 33 similar cases where FLUX's price broke its lower Bollinger Band, and 33 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $12.38 crossed the support line at $15.52 and is trading between $15.52 support and $12.09 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 01/25/21 - 02/25/21, the price experienced a -23% Downtrend. During the week of 02/18/21 - 02/25/21, the stock fell -20%.

https://preview.redd.it/zutk65hryuj61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=ff2141e63947fb3eb2be22ea3923866a25ae3b7e

 **Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator demonstrates that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 2 days, which means it's wise to expect a price bounce in the near future.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 28 of 31 cases where FLUX's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

The 50-day Moving Average for FLUX moved above the 200-day moving average on January 05, 2021. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +8.17% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where FLUX advanced for three days, in 100 of 119 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

FLUX may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9537271-flux-power-holdings-s-flux-12-23-price-may-climb-as-it-breaks-lower-bollinger-band-on-feb-25-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
